/usr/bin/ar qc libcamstreamkit_lib.a  CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/core/buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/core/config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/core/thread_pool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/core/media_source.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/core/media_hub.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/core/gop_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/net/tcp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/net/udp_socket.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/rtp/rtp_packet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/rtp/rtp_packetizer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/codec/h264_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/codec/h265_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/sdp/sdp_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/rtsp/rtsp_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/rtsp/rtsp_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/rtsp/rtsp_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/http/api_server.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/webrtc/dtls_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/webrtc/srtp_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/webrtc/stun.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/webrtc/webrtc_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/camstreamkit_lib.dir/webrtc/whep_server.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcamstreamkit_lib.a
